name: Megasoft Limited
summary: Megasoft Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides information technology services focusing on telecommunication domain primarily in the United States, Canada, South America, Latin America, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia-Pacific. The company engages in the computer programming, consultancy, and related activities. It offers mobile infrastructure solutions, including XIUS mobile services platform (MSP), which provides end-to-end infrastructure for 3G, 4G, 5G mobile operators, MVNE/mobile virtual network operators, converged broadband 4G/LTE service providers, mobile operator wholesale departments, and machine-to-machine/Internet of Things (IoT) service providers; XIUS MSP that offers a suite of infrastructure options, which enable real-time rating and billing; and Megasoft that enables service providers to navigate mobile ecosystems. The company also provides mobile payment technologies and services, including platforms and applications, e-wallets, and mobile and digital currencies. In addition, it offers analytics, cloud, cyber security, mobile enablement, and IoT services. Megasoft Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
